# ČS Dating Wien

> ČS Dating Wien is Vienna's curated speed dating event for Slovaks and Czechs. Edition I takes place on Monday, 22 June 2026, 19:30–21:30 at a mystery venue in Vienna (exact location announced 48 hours before the event to confirmed guests). 20 spots (10 men, 10 women). Standard entry: €69. With code EDITION1 (available until 1 June 2026): €39 including a welcome drink. Organizer: Jakub Popluhar, M.Ed., based in Vienna.

## About the Event

ČS Dating Wien brings together Slovak and Czech expats in Vienna for an in-person curated speed dating evening. The format: 10 rounds of 5 minutes each. Matches are arranged privately after the event. The event is conducted in Slovak and Czech. No German or English required.

The event addresses a gap in Vienna's dating scene: Slovaks and Czechs in Vienna (tens of thousands of people) have no dedicated venue for meeting romantic partners who share their language and cultural background.

## Upcoming Events

- [Edition I – 22 June 2026](https://csdating.eu/) : Speed dating, 20 spots (10+10), Vienna mystery venue, €69 (€39 with code EDITION1 until 1 June 2026)
- Edition II – date to be announced after Edition I

## Pricing

Standard entry fee: €69. With code EDITION1 (valid until 1 June 2026): €39 + welcome drink included. Full refund within 72 hours if the applicant does not match the criteria.

## Organizer

Jakub Popluhar — M.Ed., international event organizer. Has attended dozens of speed dating events in Vienna and founded ČS Dating Wien to fill the gap he personally experienced.

## Language Reference Pages

- [English page](https://csdating.eu/index-en.html) : Full event info in English for international context
- [Slovak page](https://csdating.eu/) : Primary language version
- [Czech page](https://csdating.eu/index-cz.html) : Czech language version

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What language is the event in?
A: Slovak and Czech. The MC alternates both languages. No German required.

Q: Who can attend?
A: Slovaks and Czechs living in Vienna, aged 25–39, seriously looking for a relationship.

Q: Is there a refund policy?
A: Yes. Full refund within 72 hours if the application does not match criteria. Other cancellation rules: see the Terms page on csdating.eu/terms/.

Q: How does matching work?
A: After the event, attendees submit a match form. If interest is mutual, contacts are exchanged privately between the two people only.
